title: Love You Papa
overview: Blissful couple Ansh and Shikha give birth to an adorable daughter. Soon after Shikha's death, Ansh is thrown into a situation where he has to raise his daughter all alone. Watch how Ansh meets up to his daughters' expectations along with the hardships.
